case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC VS. WILFREDO C CRUZ et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: MERRILL, ANN K. SUBSTITUTED FOR YALON, JEROME MICHAEL AS ATTORNEY FOR MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF FIRM NAME WITH PROOF OF MAILING ATTACHED FILED BY ATTORNEY YALON, JEROME MICHAEL
DECLARATION OF COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 1033(B)(2) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRUZ, WILFREDO C $4,509.65 PRINCIPAL, $383.01 INTEREST, $240.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,132.66, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $240.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, WILFREDO C
DECLARATION RE: WAIVER OF ALL ATTORNEYS' FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC SERVED OCT-21-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, WILFREDO C
